description: TPM persona — design_skill call for the 26ai FA DB Upgrade weekly exec PPTX. Includes source capability inventory from INSPECT_SOURCES with synthesisable fields for risks/milestones/ORM/next_steps. This is the canonical 26ai walkthrough input for DESIGN_SKILL.

normalised_intent.description: Weekly executive review PPTX for the FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai project. Covers status, key milestones, ORM, risks, and next steps for the FAaaS leadership.

available_fields.evidence: Project Name: FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai (Section 1 metadata table)
Current Phase: Design and POC (Section 1 metadata table)
Executive Summary: Provision new pods running 26ai DB... (Section 3)
WBS rows 5.0/5.01: '4/29: FRE informed that this deliverable needs additional time. ETA to be finalized.' External dependency risks scattered across WBS Update Notes column.
WBS rows 1.0-6.x have Status column (GreenComplete, BlueIN PROGRESS, GreyNOT STARTED) and Due Date columns. Milestone M1-M5 table in Section 4.
WBS row 6.04.1: 'SUT will need to start from 05/16 to 06/01'. Open IN PROGRESS rows indicate pending work.
WBS rows 4.0 (ORM/CSSAP Phase), 4.1 (File ORM/OCI Release Management), 4.2 (File official CSSAP Record).
Dependencies: FRE (Repo, NGFABS etc) (Section 3 Objectives table)

missing_fields.reason: No Jira API integration in this source; only static Jira links present

suggested_fields.reason: WBS table has rich per-area status data suitable for a workstream rollup

source_capability.summary: FAaaS Project Plan for FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai. Contains project metadata, objectives/scope, milestone table (M1-M5), and WBS with 50+ task rows. Risk and next-steps information present in synthesisable form.
